name: marriott / Hotel workflow 324
goal_pattern: Find two rooms in a cheapest  hotel in Niagra Falls for three adults and one three year old  kid from May 17 to May 20, view only available hotels within 100 to 200 dollar range  with taxes and fees, and choose the cheapest hotel that offers free breakfast and a pool.

activation.when_to_use: Use for tasks with a similar goal on the same site area.
activation.when_not_to_use: Do not use if the current task asks for a different flow or page area.

steps.intent: type the DESTINATION WHERE CAN WE TAKE YOU?SEARCH FROM CUR...
steps.target: DESTINATION WHERE CAN WE TAKE YOU?SEARCH FROM CUR...
steps.value_policy: Use the task-specific value for this field.
steps.selection_rule: Choose the current visible candidate whose label, role, or nearby text best matches the target description.
steps.success_signal: The page advances or the selected field reflects the intended value.

termination.success_check: Stop when the task-specific goal is satisfied or the expected confirmation/result is visible.

guards: Never copy old element ids; choose only ids visible in the current observation.
If the expected UI state is absent, ignore this procedure and reason from the page.
If a click does not advance the page, re-check visible labels before retrying.
